items.description: Crash on US 15 southbound between Exit: I-80 EAST - BLOOMSBURG and Exit: NEW COLUMBIA ROAD. There is a lane restriction.
items.formatted: US-15 (Union County) | Crash on US 15 southbound between Exit: I-80 EAST - BLOOMSBURG and Exit: NEW COLUMBIA ROAD. Estimated Reopen: 5/4/26 - 05:30
